title: dasymalla teckiana
intro: Dasymalla teckiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy or sunflower. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Dasymalla teckiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
